hero.sub: Upload your resume — get it reformatted into any template, ready to send.
hero.uploadHint: or drop it here · PDF, DOCX

converter.templateSubtitle: DOCX template or PDF reference sample
converter.convertHint: Upload a target format to continue

steps.title: Upload any resume
steps.body: PDF or DOCX — text-based files supported.

steps.title: Upload target format
steps.body: Use a DOCX template, or upload a PDF as a visual reference sample.

steps.title: Review and generate
steps.body: Compare the original preview with extracted fields, edit anything, then generate client-ready output.

showcase.heading: Any resume, your client-ready format.
showcase.sub: Extract into structured fields, preserve the original for review, and render through the controlled DOCX/PDF pipeline.

items.title: Nothing invented, nothing lost
items.body: Every field comes from your original resume. Gaps are flagged for you to fill — missing facts are never made up.

items.title: Review before you send
items.body: See the original and the result side by side. Click any field to edit before downloading.

items.title: About 20 seconds
items.body: From upload to formatted output in roughly twenty seconds. No queue, no account required.

footer.brandDesc: Reformat any resume into any template — fast, accurate, ready to send.

pricing.heading: Simple pricing
pricing.sub: Pay for conversions, not seats. Cancel anytime.
pricing.trustLine: Uploaded files are deleted after processing. We never store your resume.

faq.a: No. Files are deleted immediately after processing.

faq.q: Can my whole team use one account?
faq.a: Yes, on the Team plan with unlimited seats.
Yes. Cancelling stops future charges immediately.

review.pdfFallback: PDF preview not available in this browser.
review.previewFallback: Preview not available for this file type.
review.emptySlot: Not in original — click to fill
review.generateError: Could not generate the output files.

sections.heading: Information we process
sections.body: (1) Resume files you upload and the information in them (name, contact details, work history, etc.). (2) Your email address when you create an account. (3) Basic usage records (timestamps, conversion counts). Payments are handled by our payment processor; we never store card numbers.

sections.heading: How we use it
sections.body: To provide the resume conversion service, manage accounts, process billing, and improve the service through aggregate statistics.

sections.heading: Retention and deletion
sections.body: Uploaded resume files and extracted content are deleted immediately after processing and are not stored on our servers. Account data is deleted without delay when you close your account. Records we are legally required to keep (e.g. billing) are retained for the statutory period.

sections.heading: Service providers
sections.body: We use third-party providers for hosting [Vercel / Render — TBD], AI document processing [TBD], and payments [TBD].

sections.heading: No selling of data
sections.body: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties, except where required by law.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction of your personal data at any time via the contact below.

sections.heading: Changes
sections.body: We will post any changes to this policy on this page at least 7 days before they take effect.

sections.heading: The service
sections.body: Reform converts resumes you upload into the template you choose.

sections.heading: Your responsibilities
sections.body: Only upload documents you have the right to use. If you upload someone else's resume (e.g. as a recruiter), you confirm you are legally permitted to process that information.

sections.heading: Review your output
sections.body: Results are generated automatically and may contain errors. You are responsible for reviewing output before using or submitting it. We do not guarantee accuracy or completeness.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: You own your uploaded documents and the converted output. We own the service itself (software, design, trademarks).

sections.heading: Prohibited use
sections.body: No reverse engineering, bulk automated requests, or processing of others' personal data without authorization.

sections.heading: Fees and cancellation
sections.body: Paid plans are billed monthly and can be cancelled anytime; cancellation stops future charges. Fees already paid are non-refundable except where required by law.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
sections.body: To the extent permitted by law, our liability is limited to the amount you paid us in the previous 3 months.

sections.heading: Changes and governing law
sections.body: We will announce changes 7 days before they take effect. These terms are governed by the laws of [jurisdiction — TBD].

errors.network: Could not reach the server — check your connection and try again.
errors.invalidFileType: Only PDF and DOCX files are supported.
